Product Description:

Important Reminder!!! 1) Attention: All products in our store do not support Canada self pickup ordering. Please do not create shipping labels for Canada. Our American products do not support self pickup to Canada 2)We do not ship to Alaska, Hawaii, US protectorates (e.g., Puerto Rico), P.O. boxes, or APO/FPO addresse 3)We don’t accept non-defective remorse returns Natural Appeal - This entryway table showcases a beautiful natural oak veneer finish, skillfully blending rustic charm with modern aesthetics. Its timeless design complements any decor, making it an ideal addition to your home. Ample Storage Space - Enjoy a functional storage solution with this long console table, boasting a spacious tabletop and three large drawers. The open bottom shelf is perfect for organizing larger baskets, effectively eliminating clutter. Versatile Use - It offers versatility as a chic entry table, stylish sofa table, or practical TV stand. This furniture piece shines in entryways, hallways, or living rooms, amplifying functionality while adding sophistication to any space. Robust Construction - Constructed from high-quality MDF, this narrow console table with storage can support up to 200 lbs. Its anti-slip foot pads not only guard your floors against scratches, but also minimize noise during movement, ensuring lasting durability. Easy Assembly with Support - This sofa table measures: 13.78" D x 66.93" W x 35.43" H. It comes with all necessary tools and clear instructions for quick setup. If you have any inquiries, our friendly customer service team is always ready to assist.
